CancelQuery.description: Grants permission to cancel queries in your account

CreateBatchLoadTask.description: Grants permission to create a batch load task in your account

CreateDatabase.description: Grants permission to create a database in your account

CreateScheduledQuery.description: Grants permission to create a scheduled query in your account

CreateTable.description: Grants permission to create a table in your account

DeleteDatabase.description: Grants permission to delete a database in your account

DeleteScheduledQuery.description: Grants permission to delete a scheduled query in your account

DeleteTable.description: Grants permission to delete a table in your account

DescribeAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to describe your account settings

DescribeBatchLoadTask.description: Grants permission to describe a batch load task in your account

DescribeDatabase.description: Grants permission to describe a database in your account

DescribeEndpoints.description: Grants permission to describe timestream endpoints

DescribeScheduledQuery.description: Grants permission to describe a scheduled query in your account

DescribeTable.description: Grants permission to describe a table in your account

ExecuteScheduledQuery.description: Grants permission to execute a scheduled query in your account

GetAwsBackupStatus.description: Grants permission to get Status of a Timestream Table Backup

GetAwsRestoreStatus.description: Grants permission to get Status of a Timestream Table Restore

ListBatchLoadTasks.description: Grants permission to list batch load tasks in your account

ListDatabases.description: Grants permission to list databases in your account

ListMeasures.description: Grants permission to list measures of a table in your account

ListScheduledQueries.description: Grants permission to list scheduled queries in your account

ListTables.description: Grants permission to list tables in your account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags of a resource in your account

PrepareQuery.description: Grants permission to issue prepare queries

ResumeBatchLoadTask.description: Grants permission to resume a batch load task in your account

Select.description: Grants permission to issue 'select from table' queries

StartAwsBackupJob.description: Grants permission to start a Backup Job for a Timestream Table

StartAwsRestoreJob.description: Grants permission to start Restore Job for a Backup of Timestream Table

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

Unload.description: Grants permission to issue Unload queries

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag from a resource

UpdateAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to update your account settings

UpdateDatabase.description: Grants permission to update a database in your account

UpdateScheduledQuery.description: Grants permission to update a scheduled query in your account

UpdateTable.description: Grants permission to update a table in your account

WriteRecords.description: Grants permission to ingest data to a table in your account

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
